first_run.rationale: The score is identical in both evaluations. The textual differences are minor rephrasings and reordering of the same core points about the candidate's skills and experience. Both evaluations identify the same strengths (agentic workflows, distributed systems) and the same weaknesses (lack of large-scale team leadership, missing fintech/regulatory experience). The changes are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce any new concerns or reasoning tied to the location change.
